scripts.prerelease: yarn lint && yarn format:check && yarn build
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m "chore: release v%s" && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m "chore: release v%s" && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major -m "chore: release v%s" && git push --follow-tags
